content.principles: 1. Network: HTTP/2, Caching (Cache-Control), CDN, Compression (Gzip/Brotli). 2. Bundle: Code splitting (dynamic import), Tree-shaking, Image lazy loading. 3. Rendering: Debounce/Throttle, Virtual lists for large data, avoiding layout thrashing. 4. Core Web Vitals: LCP (Largest Contentful Paint), FID (First Input Delay), CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift).
pitfalls: Large 3rd party libraries bloating the bundle (e.g., Moment.js).
Forced synchronous layout (Read/Write DOM cycles in a loop).
follow_up_paths: Server-Side Rendering (SSR) vs Static Site Generation (SSG)
